images.caption: Figure 1:An overview of the proposed quality-guided semi-supervised segmentation methods, along with the scope of experiments present in this paper.

Figure 2:Scatter plot of the segmentation predictions’ DiceDSC​(y,y^)\mathrm{DSC}(y,\hat{y})and the corresponding predicted quality estimatesgϕ​(x,y^)g_{\phi}(x,\hat{y})on the test set of CLI dataset, and four representative images (A-D) with the ground truth (green) and predicted (red) segmentations. We observe a strong, stat. sig., positive linear correlation (ρ\rho=0.69;pp=1e-314).
